overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The character travels from an industrial corridor beneath an overpass, crosses a busy intersection with holographic advertisements, and enters a commercial district with bright neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service corridor beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk beneath the overpass, passing industrial ventilation structures

entered.detail: dark metal wall with vertical slats and ventilation grilles running along the left side
massive concrete overpass creating a covered corridor effect overhead
tall poles with bright linear LED lights illuminating the sidewalk
large industrial air vents with caution stripes at the base of the building

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered industrial corridor beneath an elevated highway. The left side features a dark industrial facility with ventilation grilles and caution barriers, while the right side shows a multi-lane road with sparse traffic. Bright streetlights cast reflections on the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to major intersection with traffic signals

events.description: passing building entrance with cherry blossom neon signage, industrial corridor opens toward intersection
approaching crosswalk, preparing to cross the multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian ahead while approaching the intersection, maintaining steady pace on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: person in white pants and dark jacket walking ahead toward the crosswalk

entered.detail: pink neon sign with cherry blossom motif above a building entrance
tall traffic signal poles with illuminated lights at the intersection ahead
yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines visible on the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The corridor opens up as the character approaches a major intersection. A neon cherry blossom sign marks a building entrance on the left. The character follows a pedestrian ahead toward the crosswalk, with traffic lights and crossing markings becoming visible. The overpass recedes as the scene becomes more open.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial intersection with holographic advertisements

events.description: stepping onto crosswalk and beginning to cross the multi-lane intersection
crossing into commercial district with bright neon billboards and holographic signs

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection and continuing along the opposite sidewalk into the commercial area

notable_agents.action: orange jeep driving through the intersection
white sports car waiting at the traffic light

entered.detail: large vertical red neon sign spelling REVE on the building facade
bright digital advertisements and holographic displays on building walls
tall modern skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents
bold yellow grid pattern marking the pedestrian crossing area

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide intersection marked with yellow grid lines, navigating between vehicles including an orange jeep. Upon reaching the opposite side, the environment transforms into a vibrant commercial district dominated by the bright red REVE neon sign and holographic billboards on modern glass towers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim industrial underpass into a vibrant, neon-drenched commercial district. It begins beneath an elevated highway in a covered corridor, where the camera tracks the character past dark ventilation grilles and caution barriers beside a wet, reflective road. As the overpass recedes, the space opens up toward a major intersection, passing a neon cherry blossom sign and following a pedestrian toward the crosswalk. The scene then shifts as the character navigates across wide yellow grid lines and between idling vehicles, including an orange jeep. Finally, the environment transforms into a bright urban hub dominated by towering glass buildings, holographic billboards, and a glowing red REVE neon sign.
